posts.author: chitreshlunawat
posts.community: Concord Control Systems - An SME railway stock
posts.text: Progota India Private Limited, has received an order worth Rs. 279.90 crore from Indian Railways for the supply, installation, testing and commissioning of onboard KAVACH 4.0 loco equipment. The order is domestic in nature and is scheduled to be executed within 12 months 280 cr Kavach order which is more than the revenue last year https://www.bseindia.com/xml-data/corpfiling/AttachHis/1c8accc1-2340-4af5-bd15-90d9b94e4cca.pdf
